patches.historical_behavior: The completed campaign served verified prepared images to local vLLM endpoints through file URLs.
patches.public_behavior: The public client embeds the same verified image bytes as data URLs so the request itself is content-bound.

patches.historical_behavior: Campaign metadata recorded immutable model and runtime-view revisions.
patches.public_behavior: Model preparation records and verifies the exact file inventory, every file hash, source revision, and content-set revision before generation verification passes.

patches.historical_behavior: The archived campaign was checked before publication and exported with file-level hashes.
patches.public_behavior: The standalone verifier recomputes row-level deterministic and historical score fields and pins the complete public release receipt.

patches.historical_behavior: The internal launch environment supplied local endpoints and trusted inputs.
patches.public_behavior: Endpoint authentication is explicit, tokenizer remote code is opt-in, and duplicate Python-literal answer keys are rejected.

patches.historical_behavior: The frozen suite and archived paper run identify the validation Parquet at the historical e317b746b258630682367cc6a9d87dedd195113c dataset revision.
patches.public_behavior: New runs prepare the immutable 4e5b54361360296a855542b40cfd8b7f81b355fe revision and validate the checked-in equivalence receipt that proves all existing columns, row order, and image bytes match the historical dataset; trace_supervision_mode is the sole added advisory column.
